messages.content:
(base) root@bingli-jbmxc-3917161-worker-0:/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/intern-pretrain-shared02/wangbingli/datasets/CoMM/CoMM/benchmark/category-1-arrangement/v1# curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer empty"   -k http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1/chat/completions   -d '{"model":"Qwen3.5-27B","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"who are you?"}],"max_tokens":128,"stream":false}'
{"object":"error","message":"1 validation error:\n  {'loc': ['header', 'content-type'], 'msg': \"Unsupported Media Type: Only 'application/json' is allowed\", 'type': 'value_error'} [{'loc': ['header', 'content-type'], 'msg': \"Unsupported Media Type: Only 'application/json' is allowed\", 'type': 'value_error'}]","type":"Bad Request","param":null,"code":400}(base) root@bingli-jbmxc-3917161-worker-0:/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/intern-pretrain-shared02/wangbingli/datasets/CoMM/CoMM/benchmark/category-1-arrangement/v1#
  
这是什么报错

这是 **HTTP 400 的参数校验报错**：你的请求没有带 `Content-Type: application/json`，服务端只接受 JSON，所以返回了：

- `Unsupported Media Type: Only 'application/json' is allowed`
- 位置在 `header -> content-type`

你现在用 `curl -d '...'` 发送数据时，默认的 `Content-Type` 通常是 `application/x-www-form-urlencoded`，不符合接口要求。

把请求改成这样即可：

```bash
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer empty" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model":"Qwen3.5-27B","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"who are you?"}],"max_tokens":128,"stream":false}'
```

（如果你想更稳一点，也可以用 `--json`：`curl --json '...' ...`，它会自动加正确的 Content-Type。）
